notes: v0.16.15 — Boss Rush leaderboard class filter tabs. New row above the rankings: ALL / SHARD / BASTION / LANCE / CHORUS. Click a class tab and the list filters to only clears achieved with that class — see who beat a boss fastest with BASTION specifically. Legacy clears (no class tag, pre-v0.16.13) now default to SHARD so they appear in the SHARD tab and show their colored pill in the row. Each row shows a class+skin pill in the class colour next to the nick. Filter selection persists across difficulty + boss swaps. Windows only.
